use_cases: Creating animated gradient text effects for landing page headlines
Adding visual emphasis to featured content or promotional text
Implementing decorative text elements with premium feel
ai_summary: A text component that applies a smooth shimmer gradient animation effect using motion/react and CSS. Supports 20+ color variants with customizable duration and delay props. The effect creates a light sweep across text, making it ideal for headlines, hero sections, and emphasized content in modern UI designs.
